productDisplayName: Tokyo Talkies Women Printed Grey Top
description: Composition Grey melange T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and rubber print on the front Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash using mild detergent Do not bleach Do not dry in direct sunlight Warm iron; do not iron directly on print/embroidery Custom graphics add to the edgy look of this tokyo talkies T-shirt. The rubber print on the front with the bumble bees and the words "Follow me" are sweet and suggestive at the same time, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day long. Team this with jeans, carpis or shorts. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5'7' and chest 33"
